# EdgeOne Pages Templates

> A collection of ready-to-use web application templates for [Tencent EdgeOne Pages](https://edgeone.ai/products/pages) — deploy stunning websites to the edge in minutes.

## Docs

- [README](README.md): Project overview, features, benefits, and usage guide

## Templates

- [AI Customer Service](examples/ai-customer-service/README.md): AI Customer Service — Dify Web Template
- [Angular](examples/angular-template/README.md): Angular starter template
- [Anime List](examples/anime-list/README.md): Anime list app built with ReactJS
- [Animene](examples/animene/README.md): Anime & Manga browsing site
- [Astro](examples/astro-template/README.md): Astro starter kit
- [Blog with Retypeset and Contentful](examples/blog-with-retypeset-and-contentful/README.md): Static blog theme based on AstroJS and Contentful
- [China Shopping Websites](examples/china-shopping-websites/README.md): Chinese online shopping websites directory
- [Chrome AI](examples/chrome-ai/README.md): Device model demo using Chrome AI Gemini Nano
- [Clerk Authentication Starter](examples/clerk-authentication-starter/README.md): Authentication starter with Clerk
- [CLI MCP Client](examples/cli-mcp-client/README.md): MCP client command-line interface
- [COS Batch Uploader](examples/cos-batch-uploader/README.md): Tencent Cloud COS batch file uploader
- [Custom Rules](examples/custom-rules/README.md): EdgeOne Pages custom rules demo
- [DeepSeek](examples/deepseek/README.md): DeepSeek playground
- [DeepSeek R1 Edge](examples/deepseek-r1-edge/README.md): DeepSeek R1 running at the edge with EdgeOne Pages AI
- [DeepSeek R1 with Network](examples/deepseek-r1-with-network/README.md): DeepSeek R1 enhanced with network search capabilities
- [Dify Frontend](examples/dify-frontend/README.md): Dify web text generator frontend
- [Directory Site](examples/directory/README.md): Directory site template using Indie Developers' Toolbox as an example
- [Docusaurus](examples/docusaurus-template/README.md): Docusaurus documentation site
- [Edge AI Gateway](examples/edge-ai-gateway/README.md): AI gateway deployed at the edge
- [Excalidraw](examples/excalidraw/README.md): Excalidraw online whiteboard
- [Free Deep Research](examples/free-deep-research/README.md): EdgeOne Pages AI free deep research tool
- [Free for Dev](examples/free-for-dev/README.md): Free-for-dev resources mind map
- [Fumadocs](examples/fumadocs-template/README.md): Fumadocs documentation template
- [Functions: Custom Fetch](examples/functions-fetch/README.md): EdgeOne Pages Functions custom fetch example
- [Functions: Geolocation](examples/functions-geolocation/README.md): EdgeOne Pages Functions geolocation example
- [Functions: KV Store](examples/functions-kv/README.md): EdgeOne Pages Functions KV store example
- [Functions: AI OCR](examples/functions-ocr/README.md): EdgeOne Pages Functions AI OCR example
- [Functions: Supabase](examples/functions-supabase/README.md): EdgeOne Pages Functions with Supabase database
- [Gatsby](examples/gatsby-template/README.md): Gatsby starter template
- [Gatsby WooCommerce](examples/gatsby-woocommerce-template/README.md): Gatsby e-commerce for WordPress headless CMS
- [Hexo](examples/hexo-template/README.md): Hexo blog boilerplate
- [Hono](examples/hono/README.md): EdgeOne Pages Hono application
- [HTML5UP Massively](examples/html5up-massively/README.md): Massively theme by HTML5 UP
- [HTML5UP Paradigm Shift](examples/html5up-paradigm-shift/README.md): Paradigm Shift theme by HTML5 UP
- [MCP Geo](examples/mcp-geo/README.md): MCP with Pages Functions geolocation demo
- [MCP on Edge](examples/mcp-on-edge/README.md): MCP client and server implementation with EdgeOne Pages Functions
- [MCP Open](examples/mcp-open/README.md): EdgeOne Pages MCP
- [Next.js + Formspree](examples/next-formspree-template/README.md): Next.js template with Formspree form handling
- [Next.js](examples/nextjs-template/README.md): Next.js starter template
- [Nextra Docs](examples/nextra-docs-template/README.md): Nextra documentation template
- [Nuxt Content Starter](examples/nuxt-content-starter/README.md): Nuxt content starter
- [Nuxt](examples/nuxt-template/README.md): Nuxt 4 minimal starter
- [Portfolio with Sanity](examples/portfolio-with-sanity/README.md): Portfolio site with Sanity CMS
- [Qwik](examples/qwik-template/README.md): Qwik City application
- [React ESR](examples/react-esr/README.md): React edge-side rendering template
- [React Router v7](examples/react-router-v7/README.md): React Router v7 template
- [React.js](examples/reactjs-template/README.md): Create React App starter
- [Remix](examples/remix-template/README.md): Remix starter template
- [S3 Batch Uploader](examples/s3-batch-uploader/README.md): S3-compatible batch file uploader
- [Solid](examples/solid-template/README.md): SolidJS starter template
- [Stripe Subscription with Astroship](examples/stripe-subscription-with-astroship/README.md): SaaS site template with Supabase and Stripe
- [Stripe Subscription Starter](examples/subscription-starter/README.md): Stripe subscription starter
- [Supabase Auth Starter](examples/supabase-auth-starter/README.md): Supabase authentication starter
- [Svelte](examples/svelte-template/README.md): SvelteKit starter template
- [Technical Resume](examples/technical-resume/README.md): Free web developer resume templates
- [TRTC AR](examples/trtc-ar/README.md): Web beauty/AR template using TRTC
- [Vite + React](examples/vite-react/README.md): React + TypeScript + Vite template
- [Vite + Vue 3](examples/vite-vue3/README.md): Vue 3 + Vite template
- [VitePress](examples/vitepress-template/README.md): VitePress documentation template
- [Vue](examples/vue-template/README.md): Vue.js starter template
- [WordPress + Gatsby](examples/wordpress-gatsby/README.md): Boost WordPress site speed with EdgeOne Pages using Gatsby
- [WordPress + Hexo](examples/wordpress-hexo-template/README.md): Boost WordPress site speed with EdgeOne Pages using Hexo
